name: Project 03 - Real DataOps Ingestion, KPI Storage, OpenRouter Insights, Power BI Ready

parameters.content: Real Integration Mode skeleton. Scheduled workflow reads cleaned orders from PostgreSQL or staged imports, validates data quality, calculates KPIs, uses OpenRouter for executive insights, stores reports, and sends stakeholder email. Power BI connects to PostgreSQL/reporting views outside this workflow.

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM sales_orders_clean WHERE loaded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 days';

nodes.name: Code - Validate Data Quality And Calculate KPIs
IF - Data Quality Issues Need Logging

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_errors (n8n_execution_id, workflow_name, node_name, severity, error_message, payload_reference) VALUES ('{{$execution.id}}', 'Project 03 - DataOps', 'Code - Validate Data Quality And Calculate KPIs', 'warning', 'Data quality issues found: {{$json.data_quality_issue_count}}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.report_payload.quality_issues) }}');

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $env.OPENROUTER_MODEL, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a DataOps analyst. Return strict JSON only with executive_summary, risk_notes, recommended_actions. Do not invent metrics not present in input.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json) } ], response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kpi_reports (report_date, report_type, total_revenue, pending_payments, overdue_invoice_amount, overdue_invoice_count, average_order_value, insight_summary, model_name, prompt_version, report_payload) VALUES ('{{$json.report_date}}', 'weekly_sales_ops', {{$json.total_revenue}}, {{$json.pending_payments}}, {{$json.overdue_invoice_amount}}, {{$json.overdue_invoice_count}}, CASE WHEN {{$json.total_orders}} > 0 THEN {{$json.total_revenue}} / {{$json.total_orders}} ELSE 0 END, '{{$json.insight_summary}}', '{{$json.model_name}}', '{{$json.prompt_version}}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.report_payload) }}'::jsonb);

nodes.name: Postgres - Store KPI Report For BI

parameters.content: Power BI integration is intentionally documented rather than represented as a live tenant connection. Recommended path: Power BI connects to PostgreSQL views over kpi_reports and sales_orders_clean, or refreshes an existing dataset through the REST API with tenant-specific credentials.

nodes.name: Sticky Note - Power BI Integration Boundary
